title: Machined Aluminum Housing IQC Quality Plan

sections.title: Edge burr containment
sections.content: Any visible burr on sealing or assembly edges requires adjacent-unit inspection and quality engineer review before release.

sections.title: Sealing face scratch hold
sections.content: Scratch or uneven mark on the sealing face requires product hold because leakage escape risk is customer-facing.

sections.title: Contamination containment
sections.content: Foreign material or handling contamination near the sealing surface requires containment until cleaning and reinspection evidence is recorded.

sections.title: Label mismatch stop
sections.content: Label mismatch or suspected SKU mix-up requires stopping station output and containing the affected time window.
